case_title: BODINE, MONTY et al vs. COHEN, EDUARDO et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DECLARATION OF DEFAULT ON CONDITION OF STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY BODINE, BARBARA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO H, MARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3807-22ND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANTS, EDUARDO COHEN AND MARY HOLSTEIN DO NOT VACATE THE PREMISES AT 3807-22ND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO BY 4-20-94, PLAINTIFFS MARY BODINE AND EDUARDO BODINE CAN RECOVER THE COSTS OF THIS SUIT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY BODINE, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO H, MARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO HOLSTEIN, MARY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO HOLSTEIN, MARY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO HOLSTEIN, MARY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO HOLSTEIN, MARY
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, EDUARDO HOLSTEIN, MARY

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY BODINE, BARBARA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COURT CONVENS, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT IS BY L STIPULATION. PLAINTIFFS MONTY AND BARBARA BODINE SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 3807-22ND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114. A PHYSICAL EVICTION MAY TAKE PLACE BY 4-20-94. IF DEFENDANTS, EDUARDO COHEN AND MARY HOLSTEIN MOVE BEFORE 4-20-94, JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED AND THE CASE DISMISSED. IF DEFENDANTS HAVE TO BE PHYSICALLY EVICTED, PLAINTIFFS, MONTE BODINE AND BARBARA BODINE SHALL BE AWARDED COSTS OF SUIT. RENT AND DAMAGES ARE WAIVED. THE LEASE IN THIS CASE IS FORFEITED. ANY SECURITY DEPOSITE SHALL BE KEPT BY THE LANDLORDS. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY SHALL PREPARE. JUDGMENT.

HOLSTEIN, MARY 3802 22ND STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114
